eventMetadata.context_description: Mark Hubbard holds a one-stroke lead at 16-under par entering the final holes of the ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic at Dunes Golf and Beach Club, bolstered by a 7-under 64 in Round 3 with birdies on four of his last five holes and a steady 65 in Round 4, positioning him firmly for a top-5 lock and potential first PGA TOUR win. Aaron Rai trails at 15-under after consistent low rounds, including a 66 today, while Kevin Roy sits third at 14-under; the T4 group at 13-under—Mac Meissner, Beau Hossler, and Brandt Snedeker—remains in top-5 contention after hot final-round starts with 64s and 67s. Brooks Koepka's charge via a 64 today lifted him to T7 at 11-under, highlighting his ball-striking form ahead of the PGA Championship, though putting limited further gains. Eight players were within five shots after 54 holes, fueling trader focus on late surges amid benign conditions on the 7,347-yard par-71 layout.

events.title: Jiujiang: Xiaodi You vs En-Shuo Liang
events.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Xiaodi You and En-Shuo Liang in the Jiujiang, originally scheduled for May 10, 2026 at 1:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Xiaodi You' if Xiaodi You advances against En-Shuo Liang.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the WTA 125 Jiangxi Open final on outdoor hard courts in Jiujiang, China, fifth-seeded Xiaodi You (world No. 194, 17-10 in 2026) faces qualifier En-Shuo Liang (No. 413, doubles No. 58) after both delivered strong tournament runs. You, riding home-crowd momentum, beat Jiaqi Wang, Carol Zhao (retired), Xinxin Yao, and Heather Watson, showcasing consistent form on her preferred surface. Liang stunned second seed Taylah Preston 7-6(5), 3-6, 6-1 in the second round before defeating Yufei Ren and Zhuoxuan Bai, holding a perfect 3-0 head-to-head edge over You, including a 6-4, 6-3 hard-court win in 2023. No injuries reported; stylistic matchup favors Liang's aggression against You's baseline steadiness.

markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Slay a Dragon?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 2. In League of Legends, elemental dragons (Infernal, Mountain, Ocean, Hextech, Chemtech, and Cloud) spawn in the dragon pit starting at 5:00 game time. After being slain, the next dragon spawns 5 minutes later. Once a team claims the Dragon Soul (by slaying four dragons), all subsequent dragon spawns become Elder Dragons.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Karmine Corp and GIANTX each slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay any elemental dragon during Game 2. Only elemental dragons count toward this market — Elder Dragon kills do not count.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain at least one elemental dragon prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Karmine Corp vs GIANTX (BO3) - LEC Regular Season
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Karmine Corp and GIANTX in the LEC Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 10 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Karmine Corp" if Karmine Corp win the match against GIANTX.

This market will resolve to "GIANTX" if GIANTX win the match against Karmine Corp.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Karmine Corp holds a commanding edge in trader consensus for their LEC regular season BO3 against GIANTX, driven by a 7-2 series record atop the standings and a five-match winning streak over GIANTX, including a 3-0 LEC Versus playoffs sweep earlier this year. KC's roster—featuring elite jungler Yike, top laner Canna, and newcomer midlaner Kyeahoo—has delivered consistent macro play and individual outduels, despite a recent 0-2 upset loss to G2 Esports in Week 7 Day 1. GIANTX sits mid-table at 5-4, buoyed by occasional upsets but hampered by a 4-12 map deficit in head-to-heads and a 0-2 defeat to Movistar KOI last match; playoffs loom for both in the top-six race, with no reported roster changes or substitutions.

markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 2. In League of Legends, each team has three inhibitors (one in each lane), located behind the inner turrets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Karmine Corp and GIANTX each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one inhibitor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Karmine Corp vs GIANTX (BO3) - LEC Regular Season
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Karmine Corp and GIANTX in the LEC Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 10 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Karmine Corp" if Karmine Corp win the match against GIANTX.

This market will resolve to "GIANTX" if GIANTX win the match against Karmine Corp.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Karmine Corp holds a commanding edge in trader consensus for their LEC regular season BO3 against GIANTX, driven by a 7-2 series record atop the standings and a five-match winning streak over GIANTX, including a 3-0 LEC Versus playoffs sweep earlier this year. KC's roster—featuring elite jungler Yike, top laner Canna, and newcomer midlaner Kyeahoo—has delivered consistent macro play and individual outduels, despite a recent 0-2 upset loss to G2 Esports in Week 7 Day 1. GIANTX sits mid-table at 5-4, buoyed by occasional upsets but hampered by a 4-12 map deficit in head-to-heads and a 0-2 defeat to Movistar KOI last match; playoffs loom for both in the top-six race, with no reported roster changes or substitutions.

markets.question: Will US unemployment reach at least 5.0% in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any seasonally adjusted unemployment rate (total unemployed, as a percent of the civilian labor force, official unemployment rate denoted as U-3) reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics in an “Employment Situation Report” for a reference month in 2026 is greater than or equal to the listed percentage. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The relevant reports for this market are the Employment Situation Reports for January-December, 2026. This market may not resolve to “No” until the Employment Situation report for December 2026 is released. If no Employment Situation Report for December 2026 is released by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, however, this market will resolve based on all previously published data up to that time. 

The resolution source for this market is the Monthly Employment Situation Report, published by the BLS every month at https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/empsit.htm, specifically the U-3 measure in Table A-15 for each month.

Note: the resolution source for this market reports unemployment to one decimal point. Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

events.title: How high will US unemployment go in 2026?
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any seasonally adjusted unemployment rate (total unemployed, as a percent of the civilian labor force, official unemployment rate denoted as U-3) reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics in an “Employment Situation Report” for a reference month in 2026 is greater than or equal to the listed percentage. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The relevant reports for this market are the Employment Situation Reports for January-December, 2026. This market may not resolve to “No” until the Employment Situation report for December 2026 is released. If no Employment Situation Report for December 2026 is released by January 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, however, this market will resolve at that time. 

The resolution source for this market is the Monthly Employment Situation Report, published by the BLS every month at https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/empsit.htm, specifically the U-3 measure in Table A-15 for each month.

Note: the resolution source for this market reports unemployment to one decimal point. Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: The US unemployment rate held steady at 4.3 percent in April 2026 per Bureau of Labor Statistics data released May 8, with nonfarm payrolls adding a modest 115,000 jobs amid prior months of subdued gains, signaling labor market stabilization rather than acceleration. Q1 GDP growth rebounded to 2.0 percent annualized from 0.5 percent in Q4 2025, bolstering hiring resilience, while continuing jobless claims hit multi-year lows despite a recent uptick in initial claims to 200,000. Federal Reserve March projections point to 4.4 percent by Q4 2026, matching economist consensus near 4.5 percent amid anticipated policy easing. Key catalysts include the May employment report on June 6 and June 16-17 FOMC meeting, which could shift rate path expectations and peak unemployment pricing.

markets.question: Will 50-74 ships transit the Strait of Hormuz between April 27-May 3?
markets.description:

Transit calls include container, dry bulk, roll-on/roll-off, general cargo, and tanker ships. Ships not reported by IMF Portwatch will not be considered.

This market will resolve as soon as data has been published for the final date in the specified period. If no data has been published for the final date of the specified period within 14 calendar days (ET) after the end of that period, this market will resolve based on data published up to that point.

Revisions to previously published data points made within this market’s timeframe will be considered. Revisions to previously published data points after data is published for the final date of the specified period, however, will not be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly backs 80-81°F as Miami's lowest temperature on May 10, with 98% implied probability, driven by official observations at Miami International Airport (KMIA) recording a minimum of 81°F early this morning. National Weather Service forecasts accurately predicted this overnight low amid mostly cloudy skies, light winds under 5 mph, and persistent dewpoints near 75°F that capped radiative cooling by trapping heat near the surface. Warm Gulf Stream sea surface temperatures around 82°F and the urban heat island effect in Miami further elevated nighttime minimums above the climatological May 10 average of 73°F. Realistic challenges include a rare equipment malfunction prompting data revision or alternative station readings, though NWS verification processes make this unlikely; the market nears resolution with KMIA data as ground truth.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Imperial Academy vs Infinite (BO3) - United21 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket quarterfinal 1 match between Imperial Academy and Infinite in the United21 Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 9 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Imperial Academy" if Imperial Academy win the match against Infinite.

This market will resolve to "Infinite" if Infinite win the match against Imperial Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Imperial Academy advanced to the United21 Season 47 playoffs upper bracket quarterfinal as undefeated Group A winners, securing a 2-0 record with dominant 2-1 and 2-0 victories over LPH Gaming and Sangal ALTERS, highlighted by strong performances on Inferno and Dust II amid a stable young roster averaging 18.9 years old. Infinite earned Group D runner-up via a 2-1 group stage (beating AaB esport twice 2-1 but losing 0-2 to Misa Esports), bolstered by recent tournament triumphs like winning United21 Season 46 and Parken Challenger Championship #5, with a higher HLTV ranking (#59) and nine-match win streak entering the BO3 clash on April 9. Stand-in fnl for Blytz on Infinite's map 1 added minor uncertainty, while both squads' map pool strengths on Ancient, Mirage, and Nuke promised a competitive matchup driven by group momentum and form.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping win the Nobel Peace Prize in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, as announced by the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

If multiple listed individuals or entities jointly receive the prize, the market will resolve to a single winner. If Donald Trump, Volodymyr Zelenskyy,  Benjamin Netanyahu, Vladimir Putin, or Elon Musk are among the recipients, the market will resolve to the highest-ranked among them in that exact order of precedence. If none of those five are among the winners and the prize is awarded jointly to at least one listed individual and at least one listed organization, the market will resolve in favor of the individual. If no prioritized individuals are among the winners and all listed recipients are of the same type (all individuals or all organizations), the market will resolve to the person whose last name, or the entity’s name, comes first in alphabetical order as listed in this market.

If no official announcement regarding the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize has been made by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other."

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement from the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

Navalnaya's lead stems from her high-profile human rights activism continuing Alexei Navalny's anti-Putin resistance, amplified by recent international awards and media buzz, while Trump's odds surged on confirmed nominations from Cambodia, Israel, and Pakistan leaders citing his diplomatic track record. Zelenskyy's standing reflects persistent Ukraine war narratives, but low probabilities across the board underscore the prize's secrecy and unpredictability, with geopolitical breakthroughs or guild-like precursor endorsements as key swing factors ahead of the October 9 announcement.

markets.question: Will Jorge Rodríguez be the de facto leader of Venezuela at the end of 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the individual who de facto holds and exercises the powers of the head of state of Venezuela on December 31, 2026 at 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, “de facto holds” refers to the individual who exercises primary executive authority over the Venezuelan state at that time, including effective control over the armed forces, national institutions, and core executive decision-making, regardless of formal title, constitutional designation, or international recognition.

Formal appointment, recognition by the United Nations, or recognition by foreign governments is not required.

If more than one individual claims to be head of state, this market will resolve to the individual who demonstrably exercises primary governing control within Venezuela’s territory at the specified time.

If no individual exercises effective governing control at the specified time, this market will resolve to “No Head of State”.

Indicators of de facto authority may include control over the armed forces and security services; control over executive ministries and state administrative institutions; enforcement of national laws; issuance of binding national directives; and effective control over the capital and core state infrastructure.

Symbolic status, foreign recognition without domestic control, nomination without effective authority, or expired prior service will not qualify.

The primary resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting assessing who exercises effective governing authority at the specified time.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket closely splits between 9°C (44%) and 8°C (42%) for London City Airport's lowest temperature on May 10, 2026, reflecting uncertainty in nocturnal cooling amid latest Met Office and BBC forecasts projecting a 5-6°C nighttime minimum under light northerly winds (3-10 mph) and partial cloud clearance after sunset. Differentiating factors include the timing of sky clearing—persistent light cloud traps longwave radiation to hold at 9°C, while earlier breaks enable radiative cooling to 8°C—tempered by London's urban heat island effect, which historically elevates May minima ~2°C above rural sites, and high overnight humidity (60-70%) slowing temperature drops. markets.question: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the September 2026 meeting?
markets.description:
The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal funds range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to the amount of basis points the upper bound of the target federal funds rate is changed by versus the level it was prior to the Federal Reserve's September 2026 meeting.

If the target federal funds rate is changed to a level not expressed in the displayed options, the change will be rounded up to the nearest 25 and will resolve to the relevant bracket. (e.g. if there's a cut/increase of 12.5 bps it will be considered to be 25 bps)

The resolution source for this market is the FOMC’s statement after its meeting scheduled for September 15-16, 2026 according to the official calendar: https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm.

The level and change of the target federal funds rate is also published at the official website of the Federal Reserve at https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the FOMC’s statement for their September meeting with relevant data is issued. If no statement is released by the end date of the next scheduled meeting, this market will resolve to the "No change" bracket.

markets.question: Will Letitia James be arrested before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual is arrested by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A qualifying arrest/detention includes:
* Being taken into physical custody by law enforcement authorities (including federal, state, local, military, or international law enforcement)
* Voluntarily surrendering to law enforcement authorities in response to an arrest warrant
* Being formally booked or processed following detention
* Being handcuffed by a state authority and taken to a police station
* Surrendering at a police station or courthouse with their attorney
* Being placed under house arrest or electronic monitoring

The following scenarios will NOT qualify as an arrest/detention
* An arrest warrant being issued but not executed
* Being briefly detained but not arrested (e.g. such as in the South Korean judicial system when an individual is awaiting a judge’s decision on whether to grant a detention warrant)
* Being questioned or interviewed without arrest
* Being named in an indictment without arrest

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the arresting government and law enforcement, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Counter-Strike: Haunted House vs THUNDER dOWNUNDER (BO3) - Asian Champions League Group B
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket quarterfinal 2 match between Haunted House and THUNDER dOWNUNDER in the Asian Champions League Group B, initially scheduled for May 11 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Haunted House" if Haunted House win the match against THUNDER dOWNUNDER.

This market will resolve to "THUNDER dOWNUNDER" if THUNDER dOWNUNDER win the match against Haunted House.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Hernan Casanova and Franco Roncadelli in the Santos, originally scheduled for May 10, 2026 at 9:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Hernan Casanova' if Hernan Casanova advances against Franco Roncadelli.

This market will resolve to 'Franco Roncadelli' if Franco Roncadelli advances against Hernan Casanova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the Santos Challenger final on outdoor clay, Hernan Casanova faces Franco Roncadelli, both vying for their first ATP Challenger title in a matchup pitting Casanova's perfect 2-0 head-to-head record—6-2 7-5 in 2024 Punta del Este and 6-7(6) 6-2 6-2 in 2025 Buenos Aires qualifying—against Roncadelli's higher No. 274 ranking over Casanova's No. 420. Roncadelli, the 26-year-old Uruguayan lefty, rallied from a set down in his semifinal win over Matheus Pucinelli de Almeida (1-6 6-3 6-4) after straight-set victories earlier, boasting a 17-9 clay record this year including an Asuncion final. The 32-year-old Argentine Casanova dominated his path straight-sets, highlighted by a 6-2 6-0 quarterfinal bagel over Murkel Dellien, with superior serve efficiency (66% first-serve points won) and fewer breaks conceded, underscoring trader focus on experience versus momentum in this evenly matched clay duel.

markets.question: Will Zack Wheeler win the 2026 NL Cy Young Award?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the player who wins the 2026 National League Cy Young Award.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 MLB season is cancelled, postponed after December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Major League Baseball; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Paul Skenes leads Polymarket's NL Cy Young trader consensus at 36.5% implied probability as the reigning 2025 winner, anchoring Pittsburgh's rotation with a league-best 0.71 WHIP, 2.36 ERA, and 5-2 record over 42 innings that underscore his elite command and strikeout ability. Yoshinobu Yamamoto sits second at 16.5% with consistent Dodgers dominance (3.09 ERA, 1.01 WHIP in 43+ innings), while Shohei Ohtani's 14.8% reflects his explosive return to pitching—capped by NL Pitcher of the Month honors for a 0.60 ERA in his first five starts—despite recent homers allowed and dual-role innings limits. Cristopher Sanchez (9.5%) and Chris Sale (8.0%) ride top-tier strikeouts (60 and 56) and ERAs under 2.50, with Sale pacing wins at six; Jacob Misiorowski (6.3%) surges on 70 league-leading Ks and 2.45 ERA as a Brewers rookie. Healthy workloads and no major injury reports bolster the crowded top tier.

markets.question: Will ICEMAN debut No.1 on Billboard 200?
markets.description:
Drake's new album "ICEMAN" is expected to release in 2026.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Drake's next officially released album debuts at No. 1 on the Billboard 200 albums chart for its first charted week following release. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If Drake does not release a new album by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

This market may resolve as soon as Billboard publishes the first chart week in which the album appears.

The primary resolution source for this market will be information from Billboard (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices ICEMAN's Billboard 200 No.1 debut at a near-certain 98.4% implied probability, driven by Drake's projected 500k+ first-week units—potentially his biggest since Certified Lover Boy—fueled by 110 million Spotify followers, a record 2026 daily streaming high of 59.7 million for any rapper, and surging back catalog performance. Industry models from Hits Daily Double and Kalshi forecast 521k units amid minimal competition from releases like Chris Brown's B.R.O.W.N., reinforcing Drake's historical dominance with 13 No.1 albums. Realistic upsets remain slim: a surprise rival surge, streaming discrepancies from ongoing lawsuits, or underwhelming tracklist reception could dent momentum before the May 15 drop and chart lock.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy, Team Spirit's academy squad with a February 2026 roster refresh featuring Kiryasoo, VILBy, and s1nside, entered Exort Series #25 Main Stage Round 1 BO3 against Wave Esports as the implied favorite based on organizational backing and prior head-to-head edges in Exort events. Wave, HLTV #251 with March roster additions of Katalic, sheezy, and Belof, showed competitive qualifier form including 2-0 wins over BIG Academy and LEO but struggled with consistency on Ancient and Dust2. Traders weighed roster cohesion in the Swiss format—where 3-0 advances to playoffs—pistol rounds, and map pools amid a stable CS2 meta, with no major patch shifts or withdrawals reported pre-match.

eventMetadata.context_description: U.S. Rep. Mike Collins leads trader consensus at 82% implied probability to win Georgia's Republican U.S. Senate primary on May 19, driven by his consistent edge in recent polls, including a Quantus Insights survey from early May showing him at 33% to Derek Dooley's 23% among decided voters, with 29% undecided. Collins benefits from endorsements by conservative groups like Club for Growth, strong base support via legislative wins such as the Laken Riley Act, and aggressive campaigning in rural areas amid early voting. Dooley's 17.5% reflects a surge backed by Gov. Brian Kemp's April stumping, though polls show him trailing; trailing candidates like Earl Carter at 1.8% lag far behind in name recognition and fundraising, leaving room for consolidation toward the frontrunner as the primary nears.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Moscow be 7°C or below on May 11?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by NOAA at the Vnukovo International Airport in degrees Celsius on 11 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=UUWW

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: ACF Fiorentina vs. Genoa CFC: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Serie A game between ACF Fiorentina and Genoa CFC, scheduled for May 10 at 9:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if ACF Fiorentina and Genoa CFC combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 5, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on legaseriea.it. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: Fiorentina host Genoa in Serie A round 36 on May 10 at Artemio Franchi, a pivotal late-season mid-table clash with Genoa 14th on 39 points and Fiorentina 15th on 37 after 34 games each. Trader focus centers on Fiorentina's unbeaten run in the last 10 head-to-heads (5W-5D) and solid home form, contrasted by Genoa's mixed away record. Genoa's 0-2 loss to Como on April 26 saw goalkeeper Justin Bijlow exit injured at halftime, compounding absences like forward Caleb Ekuban and midfielder Tommaso Baldanzi. Fiorentina contend with left-back injuries to Robin Gosens, Fabiano Parisi, and Niccolò Fortini, plus Moise Kean rested, though returns are expected by early May; no major suspensions for either side.

markets.question: Will Seattle have between 0.5 and 1 inches of precipitation in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the total precipitation in inches in Seattle between May 1 and May 31, 2026, 11:59PM ET according to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA).

The resolution source for this market will be NOAA, specifically the figure for May 2026 when the "Monthly summarized data" for "Seattle City Area" is selected with the variable set to "Precipitation" at the https://www.weather.gov/wrh/climate?wfo=sew link once that figure is finalized for the whole month of May 2026.

If the reported data falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher bracket.

The resolution source for this market measures precipitation to 2 decimal places (e.g., 1.54), thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving this market. Any revisions to precipitation recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.description:

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the DOGE/USDT High prices available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/DOGE_USDT, with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance DOGE/USDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.

markets.question: Will the Republicans win the 2028 US Presidential Election?
markets.description:
The 2028 United States presidential election will be held on Tuesday, November 7, 2028.

This market will resolve to the political party whose candidate is elected the next President of the United States in the 2028 election.

The resolution source for this market is the Associated Press, Fox News, and NBC. This market will resolve once all three sources call the race for the same party. If all three sources haven’t called the race for the same party by the inauguration date (January 20, 2029) this market will resolve based on who is inaugurated.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a Democratic win in the 2028 presidential election at 60.5%, reflecting widespread expectations of Republican setbacks in the November 2026 midterms, where markets imply high probabilities of Democrats capturing the House (around 87%) and a competitive Senate race (55% Dem control). This anticipated congressional shift would provide Democrats momentum heading into the open-seat contest, as President Trump faces term limits and historical patterns show the president's party losing House control in 9 of 10 first midterms. Odds surged to an all-time high of 61% in mid-April amid deteriorating GOP polling trends and low Trump approval ratings, holding steady despite early surveys favoring JD Vance in the Republican primary. The 2026 midterms remain the pivotal near-term catalyst.

markets.question: Abstract FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Abstract's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Abstract doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

eventMetadata.context_description: World No. 1 Jannik Sinner commands 70.5% implied probability as the clear trader consensus favorite for the 2026 Roland Garros men's singles title, fueled by his dominant clay-court swing—including a maiden Monte Carlo Masters 1000 crown over Carlos Alcaraz in April—and a 76% career win rate on the surface. Alcaraz's withdrawal due to a lingering right wrist injury, confirmed after missing Madrid and Barcelona, has cleared a major path, while Novak Djokovic enters without a 2026 clay win following a shock second-round Italian Open loss to Dino Prizmic yesterday. Alexander Zverev's 6.6% reflects his consistent deep Roland Garros runs and recent form, with young French hopefuls Arthur Fils and Rafael Jodar gaining traction amid home-crowd momentum and Sinner's lighter draw prospects.

Nicolai Højgaard and Sungjae Im lurk at T4 (-10), while a tight cluster from J.J. Spaun and Justin Thomas (-9) through Patrick Cantlay (-7) keeps the top 10 wide open amid ties and volatility on the demanding par-71 layout favoring elite ball-strikers. Heavy rain delayed Round 1, softening conditions for low scores early, but firmer turf now tests precision; no major injuries reported, though pre-tournament withdrawals like Collin Morikawa thinned the powerhouse field. Final-round pairings start at 10:00 a.m. ET, with leaders teeing off around 1:45 p.m. under improving weather.

markets.question: Israel x Hezbollah diplomatic meeting by May 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a diplomatic meeting between representatives of Israel and Hezbollah by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of Israel and Hezbollah who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding Israel-Hezbollah relations on behalf of their governments/leadership structures. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify. 

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not count.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the government of Israel and Hezbollah leadership, and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: US-mediated direct talks between Israel and Lebanon, involving their ambassadors in Washington, marked the first such diplomatic engagement in decades on April 14, with follow-up sessions amid a fragile ceasefire following escalated Israel-Hezbollah clashes. Hezbollah has rejected participation, firing rockets during initial meetings and signaling openness only to indirect negotiations via intermediaries, while opposing disarmament demands central to Israeli positions. No direct Israel-Hezbollah diplomatic contact has occurred, as the group views state-level talks as a threat. Traders watch upcoming May 14-15 Washington negotiations for potential de-escalation signals, though ongoing strikes and Hezbollah threats sustain uncertainty over any bilateral meeting by the market's resolution.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the PA-01 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the PA-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

markets.question: Total Kills Over/Under 62.5 in Game 2?
markets.description:
In the upcoming match between Nigma Galaxy and REKONIX in the 1win Essence Group B, initially scheduled for May 2 at 2:30PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 63 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.


In Dota 2, a "kill" for markets like team total kills, kill handicap, and interval kills is counted when an enemy hero dies and the game awards a hero kill event to the opposing team's score, which is the number shown on the in-game scoreboard and tracked in scoreboard feeds as team kills. In practical terms, this includes any enemy hero death that increments a team's kill score, regardless of who got the last hit, including situations where the victim dies to creeps, a tower, or neutrals as long as the kill is still credited to the enemy team. It does not include denies, such as killing your own allied units, and it also does not include building or objective destructions like towers, barracks, or Roshan, since those are tracked separately from kills. Assists also do not count as kills, because they are recorded as a separate player stat and multiple players can assist on a single kill.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket tilts toward "No" at 62% implied probability for Pope Leo XIV publishing his first encyclical by May 15, driven by the absence of any official Vatican announcement or confirmed release date despite earlier rumors. Reports from mid-March hinted at a post-Easter rollout for the anticipated social encyclical, with recent Africa trip remarks four days ago previewing themes like Church social doctrine, but no draft or publication timeline has materialized nearly a year into his May 2025 papacy. His prior "Dilexi te" apostolic exhortation in October 2025 addressed poverty but was not a full encyclical, underscoring preparation delays typical for such weighty documents. With just 13 days left, traders weigh the tight window against historical papal pacing, though a surprise announcement remains possible amid his active public engagements.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 215-239 tweets from May 11 to May 13, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from May 11 12:00 PM ET to May 13, 2026 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

events.description:

This market will resolve according to the candidate who receives the most valid votes in this primary election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the results of this election are not definitively known by December 31, 2026, this market will resolve to “Other.”

This market will resolve based on the results of the primary election for Governor of California as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the government of California, specifically the Office of the Secretary of State.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xavier Becerra's recent surge in polls has positioned him as the trader consensus frontrunner at 44.5% implied probability to finish first in California's June 2 nonpartisan top-two gubernatorial primary, driven by surveys like the latest showing him tied with or ahead of Steve Hilton amid early vote-by-mail ballots. Hilton holds steady at 23.5% on strong Republican positioning in a fragmented Democratic field, where vote-splitting could propel a GOP candidate to the general election, as seen post-Eric Swalwell's April exit. Tom Steyer trails at 20% bolstered by self-funding, Sierra Club endorsement, and progressive alliances, while recent debates highlighted attacks on Becerra's national profile. With undecided voters at 14% and the race fluid, upcoming early voting turnout will be key.

markets.question: Spread: Golden Knights (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the NHL game, scheduled for May 10 at 9:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Golden Knights" if the Golden Knights win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Ducks".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vegas Golden Knights hold a 2-1 series lead over the Anaheim Ducks in the Western Conference Second Round after a commanding 6-2 road win in Game 3 on May 8, sparked by a hat trick and strong offensive output that exposed Ducks goaltending vulnerabilities. Captain Mark Stone's lower-body injury late in the first period of Game 3 leaves his Game 4 status day-to-day, potentially impacting Vegas' top line and power play effectiveness. William Karlsson's return from a six-month absence bolstered the Knights in Game 1, while Ducks captain Radko Gudas nears a comeback from a lower-body issue missed seven games. Game 4 tonight at Honda Center gives Anaheim home-ice edge and rest for Lukas Dostal after his 21-save shutout effort in Game 2's 3-1 victory, with series momentum hinging on injury updates and special teams execution.

markets.question: Will Trump say "Darth Vader" in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald Trump mentions the listed term between May 1, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A ‘mention’ will include any verbal mention which is recorded (audio or video) and publicly accessible.

Written usages of terms (e.g. Truth Social posts, written statements, etc.) will not count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

Videos posted on his social media which were filmed outside this market's time frame will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution.

markets.question: Will Denman Rooke win the 2026 Galway West by-election?
markets.description:
A by-election for a seat from the Galway West constituency in the Dáil Éireann, the lower house of the Irish parliament, is expected to take place sometime in 2026 to fill the vacancy left by the election of Catherine Connoly as President of Ireland.

This market will resolve according to the candidate who wins the by-election for this Galway West seat in the Irish Dáil Éireann.

If voting does not take place in this election or the election results are not definitively known by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting. In case of ambiguity, this market will resolve solely based on the official election results published by the Irish government, specifically the Irish parliament or “Oireachtas” (https://www.oireachtas.ie/en/elections/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus in the Galway West by-election market favors Independent Ireland's Noel Thomas at 44.5% implied probability to win the seat vacated by President Catherine Connolly, reflecting his strong local profile from supporting recent fuel protests and cost-of-living concerns amid widespread government dissatisfaction. A fragmented field of 17 candidates under PR-STV elevates transfer dynamics, where the May 1-5 Ipsos B&A poll showed razor-thin first preferences—Fine Gael's Seán Kyne at 17%, Thomas at 16%—but traders anticipate anti-establishment preferences boosting Thomas over Kyne (20.8%) and independent mayor Mike Cubbard (28.5%), who polls at 7%. Labour's Helen Ogbu trails despite 12% support, with Fianna Fáil weakened. The May 22 vote hinges on housing, roads, and turnout in this closely contested race.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket narrowly favors Australia at 25.5% implied probability to claim the Eurovision 2026 jury winner title, driven by Delta Goodrem's "Eclipse"—a powerhouse ballad showcasing her vocal prowess and dramatic staging that previews suggest will captivate professional juries favoring sophisticated compositions. France's Monroe follows closely at 24% with the elegant "Regarde," embodying classic jury-friendly balladry, while Denmark's Torpegaard Lund ("Før vi går hjem") at 20.5% surged after topping the Eurojury mock jury aggregate in late April. Finland's Linda Lampenius & Pete Parkkonen ("Liekinheitin") holds 19%, buoyed by strong precursors but potentially splitting appeal with televote energy. With first rehearsals underway in Vienna ahead of semis on May 12/14 and final on 16, live performances and staging polish remain pivotal swing factors in this razor-thin contest.

markets.question: Nvidia Data Center Revenue above 50B in Q1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Nvidia’s data center revenue for the first fiscal quarter of 2027, as reported in its official company earnings materials, is above the listed amount. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.
The specified metric will be considered as reported in the company’s official earnings materials. Subsequent revisions will not be considered.

If the specified company’s official earnings materials for the specified quarter are released, and the specified metric is not included, this market will resolve to “No”. 
 
If the specified company does not release quarterly earnings materials for the specified quarter by July 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “No”.

If the specified metric is reported as a range rather than a specific number, the midpoint of the range will be used for resolution of this market. 

The resolution source for this market is Nvidia’s official company earnings materials, including press releases, investor presentations, and regulatory filings. If the specified metric is not reported in these materials, recordings or transcripts of the company’s earnings webcast may also be used.

Note: This market will resolve based on the most numerically precise version of the specified metric reported in the company’s official earnings materials. Only the specified metric will be considered; alternate versions that differ in definition or scope from the specified metric will not be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: NVIDIA's data center segment, powering over 90% of its revenue through AI GPU demand, faces intense scrutiny ahead of Q1 FY2027 earnings on May 20 for the quarter ended April 26, 2026. Q4 FY2026 delivered a record $62.3 billion in data center revenue, up 75% year-over-year, driven by Hopper and early Blackwell platforms amid hyperscaler capex surges from Microsoft and Amazon. Management's $78 billion total revenue guidance (±2%) excludes China compute sales due to U.S. export restrictions, implying trader consensus for segment growth near $70 billion based on analyst breakdowns assuming 90% mix. Key risks include Blackwell supply bottlenecks and gross margin compression; resolution hinges on the upcoming report.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Denver be between 54-55°F on May 11?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Buckley Space Force Base Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 11 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Buckley Space Force Base Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/co/aurora/KBKF.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: National Weather Service forecasts project a high of 87°F in Denver on May 11 under sunny skies with light west-northwest winds gusting to 16 mph, driving the market's 99.2% implied probability for 68°F or higher as trader consensus aligns with this strong model agreement from NOAA ensembles. This positioning stems from a persistent upper-level ridge amplifying above-normal temperatures—exceeding the climatological May 11 normal of 69°F—following today's milder 70°F high, with no precipitation risks in the 7-day outlook. While inherent forecast uncertainty exists, realistic challenges like an unanticipated cold air intrusion or excessive cloud cover from peripheral systems are minimal given current synoptic patterns; watch for morning updates from NWS Boulder/Denver ahead of afternoon peak heating.

markets.question: Counter-Strike: TDK vs Nuclear TigeRES (BO3) - NODWIN Clutch Series Group Stage
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 2 match between TDK and Nuclear TigeRES in the NODWIN Clutch Series Group Stage, initially scheduled for May 10 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "TDK" if TDK win the match against Nuclear TigeRES.

This market will resolve to "Nuclear TigeRES" if Nuclear TigeRES win the match against TDK.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the NODWIN Clutch Series #8 Swiss group stage Round 2 BO3, both TDK (#95 HLTV) and Nuclear TigeRES (#105) enter 1-0 after Round 1 wins—TDK edging TNC 2-0 (15-11 rounds, partial forfeit) on May 8, while Nuclear TigeRES dominated Oxuji 2-0 (+12 round differential) on May 9. Each rides a three-match win streak, with TDK's recent victories over GenOne and Famalicão offsetting losses to INOX Division and 100 Thieves, and Nuclear TigeRES rebounding from a defeat to Walczaki with clean sweeps against Alliance and ex-Zero Tenacity. Community picks favor TDK (64%), citing edges in Overpass (82% win rate) and Anubis (80%), versus Nuclear TigeRES' Anubis strength (77%); rosters remain stable post-winter changes, setting up a pivotal clash where the winner advances to 2-0 and the loser drops to the lower bracket.

markets.question: Will Google have the #2 AI model at the end of June 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will there be no Somaliland parliamentary election before 2027?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are to be scheduled to be held in Somaliland in late March 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Somaliland House of Representatives (Golaha Wakiilada) election. 

If no election takes place by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No election before 2027".

If an election takes place but the results are not known definitively by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will remain open until the certified results are released. If the results are not known definitively by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party that received a greater number of valid votes. In the event that results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the Somaliland Parliament. 

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Somaliland government, specifically the Somaliland National Electoral Commission (Komishanka Doorashooyinka Qaranka) (slnec.net).

eventMetadata.context_description: Somaliland's House of Elders recently extended House of Representatives terms by 27 months in late April 2026, postponing parliamentary elections from mid-2026 to March 2027 despite National Electoral Commission guidance, driving trader consensus to 72.5% on no election before 2027 amid concerns over democratic credibility and repeated delays. Waddani leads at 27.3% among party outcomes, bolstered by President Abdirahman Irro's 2024 presidential victory over Kulmiye incumbent Muse Bihi Abdi, signaling opposition momentum in the three-party system. UCID trails at 5.1%, while ruling Kulmiye lags at 1.6% following its electoral setback, with no recent polls shifting these dynamics ahead of potential local council polls.

markets.question: Games Total: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Semifinal 2 match between Nemiga and CYBERSHOKE Esports in the BC Game Masters Europe Series #1 Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 10 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if Nemiga and CYBERSHOKE Esports play 3 or more maps in this series.

If fewer than 3 maps are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

Maps won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the total, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching map being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Nemiga vs CYBERSHOKE Esports (BO3) - BC Game Masters Europe Series #1 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Semifinal 2 match between Nemiga and CYBERSHOKE Esports in the BC Game Masters Europe Series #1 Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 10 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Nemiga" if Nemiga win the match against CYBERSHOKE Esports.

This market will resolve to "CYBERSHOKE Esports" if CYBERSHOKE Esports win the match against Nemiga.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Nemiga Gaming enters this BO3 semifinal as the higher-ranked squad at #32 HLTV versus CYBERSHOKE at #62, buoyed by a 2-1 head-to-head victory over their opponents two weeks ago in NODWIN Clutch Series #7 on Ancient and Overpass. Both teams advanced convincingly through the BC.Game Masters Europe Season 2 Series #1 playoffs—Nemiga defeating INOX Division 2-1 and AaB 2-1 in earlier rounds, while CYBERSHOKE rode a four-match win streak, upsetting streaking Nemesis 2-0 before edging AM Gaming 2-1 in quarters after a 3-2 group stage finish. Map pool favors Nemiga's Overpass dominance (80% win rate vs. CYBERSHOKE's 0%), with syph0's 1.19 rating offsetting glowiing's strong 1.13 ADR for the underdogs; roster stability and recent momentum keep it competitive.

markets.question: Will Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (RKLB) hit (LOW) $76 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (RKLB) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (RKLB) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.RKLB%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.RKLB%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.
